title: orbea wissmannii
intro: Orbea wissmannii, also known as the Wissmann's Orbea or Pachypodium wissmannii, is a succulent plant species native to South Africa. It belongs to the Apocynaceae family and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat snake bites and other venomous stings due to its presence of bufadienolides, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antivenom properties. The health benefits of Orbea wissmannii include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a valuable asset in traditional medicine. Orbea wissmannii is often prepared as an infusion, which is believed to provide relief from various ailments, and it has been used in various herbal preparations for centuries.
